name: SerializationOptions
summary: Contains options for serializing -or storing- data, such as Rhino version, user data, and meshes.

constructors.name: SerializationOptions
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SerializationOptions class.

properties.name: MaxRhinoVersion
properties.summary: Gets the most recent serialization version available.

properties.name: MinRhinoVersion
properties.summary: Gets the earliest serialization version available.

properties.name: RhinoVersion
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating the Rhino version.

properties.name: WriteAnalysisMeshes
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to write analysis meshes

properties.name: WriteRenderMeshes
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to write render meshes

properties.name: WriteUserData
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to write user data.
